items.title: Connection schema definition
items.description: Complete description of a Benchling Connect connection schema. A connection schema defines how an integration adapter parses instrument files and what configurable fields are available on connections that use it.

Description.description: Documentation for the connection schema. Not saved to Benchling.

System name.description: Internal system name for the connection schema. Must conform to PostgreSQL naming standards.

Prefix.description: Short prefix to generate connection identifiers.

Integration adapter.description: The Benchling Connect integration adapter that parses files for this connection schema. For example: 'Benchling FileWatcher'.

Fields.description: Configurable fields that appear on connections using this schema.

items.title: Connection schema field
items.description: A configurable field on the connection schema.

Description.description: Documentation for the field. Not saved to Benchling.

System name.description: Internal system name for the field. Must conform to PostgreSQL naming standards.

Multi-select.description: Field allows multiple selections when true.

Definition.description: Name of the target object when Type is a link type (Entity, Inventory, Run) or Dropdown.

Diagram.description: Properties solely used for diagram rendering.

API ID.description: API ID for the connection schema created during an export operation. This is ignored for import operations.
